## Contributions to Congresses, Symposia and Workshops

### Presentations available online

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mEnP4GJVhRM >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/ibMIYSSPNwc?si=HYCIoTuj-OCwhyWo >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/hh8AELptzH0?si=n7MAJlp_xPd9Ug2P >}}

### Invited speaker

+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Title                                                                                                         | Year | Presentation link                                                      |
+===============================================================================================================+:====:+========================================================================+
| Fresh Cow — Risiken und chancen. Was Sie darüber unbedingt wissen sollten!                                    | 2011 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Visualisation of fertility records in dairy herds                                                             | 2012 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The use of dairy data in herd health management                                                               | 2014 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The economics of breeding protocols in dairy cows                                                             | 2015 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The past, the present and the future of bovine herd health management                                         | 2015 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Bovi‑Analytics: an e‑learning platform to educate veterinary students big data in dairy cows                  | 2015 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Challenges for data‑intensive projects                                                                        | 2016 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| From Big Data to Decisions in Dairy Cows                                                                      | 2016 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Big Dairy in Dairy Cows                                                                                       | 2016 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Visualisation and analysis of reproductive performance                                                        | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Pitfalls in Dairy Analytics (advanced technical)                                                              | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Analysis of reproductive performance (farmer orientated)                                                      | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Transition management as a key to fertility success                                                           | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How to monitor productive performance on a small vs large dairy                                               | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Common analytical data pitfalls every practitioner should know about                                          | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Will semantics help disentangle the Gordian knot of Big Data in animal health                                 | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Monitoring fertility control programs in small and large dairy herds                                          | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Opening keynote: A novel approach to data mining and prediction modelling in dairy cows                       | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Opening Keynote: BigData Moscow — A Novel Approach to Data Mining and Prediction Modelling in Dairy Cows      | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Transforming Big Data into Value: Put Data to Work for Your Dairy (Connect Summit)                            | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Transforming Big Data into Value: Put Data to Work for Your Dairy (CDCB – 10 years of genomics)               | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Metabolic clustering of dairy cows at early and peak lactation                                                | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Dairy Intelligence and Turning Data Into Information                                                          | 2019 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Predicting the Moment of Birth using Sensor Data in Dairy Cows                                                | 2019 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| What makes a biomarker a good one?                                                                            | 2019 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Put Data to Work for the Dairy Industry                                                                       | 2020 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Agricultural Genome to Phenome Initiative (AG2PI)                                                             | 2020 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Monitoring transition cows using novel techniques                                                             | 2021 | —                                                                      |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Using data to embrace excellence in hoof health — challenges and opportunities                                | 2022 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/MRa09aTFjp0QhtfywUo2/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How to Make Sense of 24×7 Sensor Data                                                                         | 2022 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/nLVoBNJdVJIOyIhyeOL3/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sustainable dairy production, EU within a global perspective                                                  | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/B3JPoKLALciOshVXXrRh/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sustainable dairy production from a global perspective                                                        | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/ZOLHC3p0xZsuagi4bjyF/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The Finnish Veterinary Congress (Helsinki, Finland)                                                           | 2023 | [Link to presentation 1](https://prezi.com/view/ZqjPIpMl6FbaT4UDE7hE/) |
|                                                                                                               |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                               |      | [Link to presentation 2](https://prezi.com/view/puBrsfmog5XBRI2fQyGC/) |
|                                                                                                               |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                               |      | [Link to presentation 3](https://prezi.com/view/RVjxVRcjUdop0ulRPlNy/) |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Een toekomst voor de veehouderij in Nederland, Europa en ver daarbuiten?                                      | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/1bcqp5GXaN9lzhFyoVLb/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| European Perspective on Longevity — the Data and Technology                                                   | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/TSLnUGj8Prs4nmhoqUME/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Advancing precision dairy farming through AI                                                                  | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/bFj1yT62ZGACMh6FnHLr/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Digital Dairy Farming (CIDA Symposium)                                                                        | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/z8wnDQHiyT8WQs63Erna/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Cattle Camp (Triesdorf, Germany)                                                                              | 2024 | [Link to presentation 1](https://prezi.com/view/8UAHuRo7iv1E4CdMQ1hm/) |
|                                                                                                               |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                               |      | [Link to presentation 2](https://prezi.com/view/w4L0dtz6sheWLCuTpmVr/) |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How can AI change the dairy industry?                                                                         | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/IOtYovVDtAGdggjkc2x6/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| CIDA Seminar (Ithaca, USA)                                                                                    | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/z8wnDQHiyT8WQs63Erna/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| What can camera technology and artificial intelligence bring to a dairy in 2025?                              | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/9q7NlCyMisLRT8Xkmbw2/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How artificial intelligence can transform an entire agricultural industry, or NOT? (IEEE MeAVeAS)             | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/kd0XP8ubYMPYWvc1d6Cj/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Effectively Implementing AI at the Interface Between Veterinary and Dairy Science (Savy)                      | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/G0ybeFsLJbJpS93LGhlo/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Effectively Implementing AI at the Interface Between Veterinary and Dairy Science (VEE)                       | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/FIEVxDgrACf0K6VwNPTz/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How artificial intelligence can transform an entire agricultural industry, or NOT? (AABP)                     | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/TszKFVppAoueipQljo6O/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How artificial intelligence can transform an entire agricultural industry, or NOT? (Georgia Dairy Conference) | 2026 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/fzhVjeu6SevmvdmxAYHk/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Growing with AI — Input Optimization Webinar                                                                  | 2026 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/GigE4M1jXg5jfO3USDYC/)   |
+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

### Oral conference presentation

| Title | Year | Presentation link |
|----|:--:|----|
| The effect of marine algae supplementation in the ration of high‑yielding dairy cows during transition and its effect on metabolic parameters in the serum and follicular fluid around parturition | 2009 | — |
| On‑farm evaluation of the effect of metabolic diseases on the shape of the lactation curve in dairy cows through the MilkBot lactation model | 2012 | — |
| Potential for novel glycan measurements in milk as biomarker phenotypes for dairy traits | 2016 | — |
| MmmooOgle: From Big Data to Decisions for Dairy Cows | 2016 | — |
| Data Mining and Prediction Modelling in the Dairy Industry Using Time Series and Sliding Windows with Apache Spark 2 | 2016 | — |
| Exploratory classification of multiparous dairy cows based on fertility‑related phenotypes | 2017 | — |
| Investigating metabolic phenotypes in multiparous dairy cows by component analysis and clustering | 2017 | — |
| The use of technologies in dairy innovation | 2018 | — |
| Can artificial intelligence be used on historical cow data to improve data quality and standardization of disease records | 2019 | — |
| Predicting the next life event of cows by applying deep learning on sequential and pictorial data | 2019 | — |
| Big Data for Dairy and Monitoring Cow Health and Performance | 2020 | — |
| The veterinary toolbox for reproductive herd health management now and in the (near) future | 2020 | — |
| Modern tools for milk recording management | 2021 | — |
| The importance of sensor data in transition cow monitoring | 2021 | — |
| Detecting the subclinical diseased transition cow: how novel phenotyping strategies can help | 2021 | — |
| Prediction of persistency at day 305 in lactation at the moment of the insemination decision | 2023 | — |
| A predictive model for hypocalcemia in dairy cows utilizing behavioural sensor data combined with deep learning | 2023 | — |
| Generative AI in agriculture | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/z8wnDQHiyT8WQs63Erna/) |
| A Foundational Framework for Animal Behavior Analysis Using Computer Vision (AI4AS, Zurich) | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/DQDjSybENZwwYGDND86L/) |
| ICAR–IDF initiative on sensor data for functional traits: genetics and reference standards for rumination | 2024 | — |
| A Foundational Framework for Animal Behavior Analysis Using Computer Vision (Precision Dairy Farming Conference, Christchurch) | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/hUL4WyzK04Q4saxgJbqI/) |

### Extension workshops

+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Title                                                                                                                                                            | Year | Presentation link                                                      |
+==================================================================================================================================================================+:====:+========================================================================+
| How we practitioners should implement our nutrition knowledge to help our farmers?                                                                               | 2011 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Technology in dairy                                                                                                                                              | 2012 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| HACCP approaches for fertility management in livestock                                                                                                           | 2013 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Herd Health Management: The future for bovine practitioners: challenge or opportunity                                                                            | 2013 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Visualisation of heat detection and conception rates in small and large dairy herds                                                                              | 2013 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Transition management and its influence on fertility                                                                                                             | 2013 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Pitfalls in the analysis of reproductive records in dairy herds                                                                                                  | 2013 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Subclinical ketosis during the transition period                                                                                                                 | 2013 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Masterclasses reproductive management in dairy cows                                                                                                              | 2014 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Visualisation and interpretation of reproductive herd records                                                                                                    | 2014 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Masterclasses reproductive management in dairy cows                                                                                                              | 2015 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Masterclasses Transition Management                                                                                                                              | 2015 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Transforming Big Data into real world evidence for SARA                                                                                                          | 2016 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Bovine herd health management                                                                                                                                    | 2016 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Dairy data management, where to start                                                                                                                            | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How to monitor reproductive performance                                                                                                                          | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Multiple sessions for the Ruminant Specialisation (General intro, pitfalls, monitoring production & reproduction, insemination & conception strategy, fertility) | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| The truth about transition disease in dairy cows                                                                                                                 | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| First results of the GplusE project                                                                                                                              | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Ruminant clinical cases                                                                                                                                          | 2017 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Monitoring reproduction in high yielding dairy cows                                                                                                              | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Feeding the dairy cow — Basics of high yielding dairy cows                                                                                                       | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Feeding the dairy cow — Feeding high intake and milk composition                                                                                                 | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Zoetis Advanced Fertility Consulting                                                                                                                             | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Act, think and work like a datascientist                                                                                                                         | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| GplusE Training School                                                                                                                                           | 2018 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Not only a success story: lessons learned moving from precision to smart dairy farming                                                                           | 2022 | —                                                                      |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sustainable Ruminant Health: How to manage it successfully                                                                                                       | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/mPsEJBmrGvacshFmgKkx/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sustainable Ruminant Health (DAP Oostland)                                                                                                                       | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/QOyh0ollFwsmMxHjokJ5/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Duurzame melkveehouderij vanuit een internationaal perspectief                                                                                                   | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/ZOLHC3p0xZsuagi4bjyF/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Meer melk uit (ruw)voer                                                                                                                                          | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/0FNmDeFp8jgUfrzZ6iV9/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| NutriVice studie bijeenkomst — Een toekomst voor de Nederlandse melkveehouderij                                                                                  | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/0FNmDeFp8jgUfrzZ6iV9/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Evolution or revolution                                                                                                                                          | 2023 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/7pMuqV5fnZl7u46ci6Of/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Toekomst van de melkveehouderij in Nederland, Europa en daarbuiten (DAMB)                                                                                        | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/1bcqp5GXaN9lzhFyoVLb/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Toekomst van de melkveehouderij in Nederland, Europa en daarbuiten (Boerensymposium)                                                                             | 2024 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/0hMkswYpDDG2ArA89jtT/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| How artificial intelligence can transform an entire agricultural industry, or NOT? (Dairy Center of Excellence)                                                  | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/k7gYvnhrPkZUJqz4d7La/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Eine Zukunft für die Milchwirtschaft                                                                                                                             | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/P47z3gjBDPhV7Gvn9lTM/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Effectively Implementing AI at the Interface Between Veterinary and Dairy Science (Bovine Practitioners Meeting)                                                 | 2025 | [Link to presentation 1](https://prezi.com/view/JEGbdXfpraUQyyhj4d98/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 2](https://prezi.com/view/1JtWOiLccl4aZwITMEkk/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 3](https://prezi.com/view/of1D9pHC9rS7f4SjPXly/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 4](https://prezi.com/view/bibFyFyrUFkE3VC90KSw/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 5](https://prezi.com/view/RMueLhxCwovV2jQm2FQH/) |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Effectively Implementing AI at the Interface Between Veterinary and Dairy Science (Ohio Veterinarians Meeting)                                                   | 2026 | [Link to presentation 1](https://prezi.com/view/JEGbdXfpraUQyyhj4d98/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 2](https://prezi.com/view/1JtWOiLccl4aZwITMEkk/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 3](https://prezi.com/view/of1D9pHC9rS7f4SjPXly/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 4](https://prezi.com/view/bibFyFyrUFkE3VC90KSw/) |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      |                                                                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                  |      | [Link to presentation 5](https://prezi.com/view/RMueLhxCwovV2jQm2FQH/) |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Toekomst van de melkveehouderij in Vlaanderen, Europa en daarbuiten                                                                                              | 2025 | [Link to presentation](https://prezi.com/view/nDpCHfZSFvSpU7pzRvtK/)   |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+------+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
